name: Baby Corn, Bok Choy, & Tofu Stir-Fry--Lowfat
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Bok choy, cut diagonally into 1-inch slices
3/4 pound Firm tofu, drained and cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a wok or 12-inch frying pan.
2. Add the ginger and garlic, and cook over medium heat for 30 seconds.
3. Add the bok choy and cook until the leaves soften and turn deeper green.
4. Add the tofu, baby corn, sherry, chili paste, and hoisin sauce.
5. Cook for 2 minutes on medium heat, stirring frequently.
6. In a small bowl, combine the water and cornstarch, stirring until smooth.
7. Move the stir-fry ingredients to the sides of the pan to make a well in the center.
8. Add the cornstarch mixture to the well and stir until it thickens.
9. Move the stir-fry ingredients into the well and coat them with the sauce.
10. Serve immediately.
YIELD: Makes 8 (1/2 cup) servings
Each serving: 89 calories, 6g protein, 3.7g total fat, 11.3g carbs, 0mg cholesterol, 2.6g fiber, 80mg sodium, 99mg calcium
Exchanges: 1/4 fat, 3/8 meat, 1/10 starch, 2 vegetable
SOURCE: The N/S Flavor Set-Point Weight-Loss Cookbook
